why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:disconnect must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official empty literal Component reason fixture only, not UI disconnect handling, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 2, official disconnect body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound table has no mapping for packet id 0x02. The generated official body is 080000 for Component.literal(""); the Rust fix may need packet id mapping plus any bounded body decoder needed for this official component fixture.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
